Here's to another year of you, being wonderfully you.

every one of them worth celebrating

✉
a note, just for you

Dear Kuttu,

I don't say this enough, so I'm putting it somewhere you can't scroll past.

You make ordinary days feel a little lighter, just by being in them.

I hope this year gives you everything you've been quietly hoping for —

and a few things you didn't even know to wish for.

Happy birthday. I'm so glad you exist.

— always, me
